meta..validate: newData.hasChildren(['hostUid', 'status', 'bankVersion', 'problemCount', 'durationSeconds', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('hostUid').isString() && (!data.exists() || newData.child('hostUid').val() === data.child('hostUid').val()) && (newData.child('status').val() === 'lobby' || newData.child('status').val() === 'active' || newData.child('status').val() === 'finished') && newData.child('bankVersion').isString() && newData.child('bankVersion').val().length <= 20 && (!newData.child('topicIds').exists() || (newData.child('topicIds').isString() && newData.child('topicIds').val().length > 0 && newData.child('topicIds').val().length <= 160)) && newData.child('problemCount').isNumber() && newData.child('problemCount').val() > 0 && newData.child('problemCount').val() <= 500 && newData.child('durationSeconds').isNumber() && newData.child('durationSeconds').val() >= 60 && newData.child('durationSeconds').val() <= 7200 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()

$uid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['uid', 'nickname', 'normalizedNickname', 'score', 'correctCount', 'joinedAt', 'online', 'ready']) && newData.child('uid').val() === $uid && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('normalizedNickname').isString() && newData.child('normalizedNickname').val().length >= 2 && newData.child('normalizedNickname').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= -100000 && newData.child('score').val() <= 1000000 && newData.child('correctCount').isNumber() && newData.child('correctCount').val() >= 0 && newData.child('correctCount').val() <= data.parent().parent().child('meta/problemCount').val() && newData.child('joinedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('online').isBoolean() && newData.child('ready').isBoolean() && (!data.exists() || (newData.child('uid').val() === data.child('uid').val() && newData.child('nickname').val() === data.child('nickname').val() && newData.child('normalizedNickname').val() === data.child('normalizedNickname').val() && newData.child('joinedAt').val() === data.child('joinedAt').val())))

!newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['score', 'solvedCount']) && newData.child('score').isNumber() && newData.child('score').val() >= -100000 && newData.child('score').val() <= 1000000 && newData.child('solvedCount').isNumber() && newData.child('solvedCount').val() >= 0 && newData.child('solvedCount').val() <= data.parent().parent().child('meta/problemCount').val())

$eventId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['uid', 'message', 'tone', 'createdAt']) && newData.child('uid').isString() && newData.child('message').isString() && newData.child('message').val().length > 0 && newData.child('message').val().length <= 160 && (newData.child('tone').val() === 'good' || newData.child('tone').val() === 'bad' || newData.child('tone').val() === 'neutral') && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()
